modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Microsoft Word will not open on macOS, error message displayed.

full_description_text: User is trying to open Microsoft Word on Mac, but it does not work. Other programs like Excel and Outlook open fine. The error message says account does not allow editing, showing "View Only" status. User is confused about why Word is not opening.
short_description: Microsoft Word will not open on macOS, error message displayed.
description: User is trying to open Microsoft Word on Mac, but it does not work. Other programs like Excel and Outlook open fine. The error message says account does not allow editing, showing "View Only" status. User is confused about why Word is not opening.
